title: Acadia Pharmaceuticals (ACAD) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: Can the Stock Move Higher?
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals was expected to beat earnings estimates heading into its Q3 2024 earnings report. Analysis suggested ACAD could report earnings of $0.17 per share, beating the consensus estimate of $0.13 per share. The positive earnings surprise potential was driven by strong DAYBUE momentum and higher-than-expected NUPLAZID volumes. Going into the earnings report, the stock had already risen significantly during the quarter, reflecting market optimism about the company's commercial progress. Analyst commentary highlighted the improving operational leverage as both products scaled and the company moved toward profitability. Multiple analysts reiterated Buy ratings and positive outlooks, with price targets ranging from $27 to $35. The combination of revenue beat potential and margin expansion provided multiple catalysts for stock appreciation.
